question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Who placed the order with the id 32423?
orig_masked: Who [T7] the [T7] with the [C45] [V1]?  ; [V1] is a value of the column [C45]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T3.client_id FROM `order` AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN disp AS T4 ON T4.account_id = T2.account_id  INNER JOIN client AS T3 ON T4.client_id = T3.client_id WHERE T1.order_id = 32423

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What year was account owner number 130 born?
orig_masked: What [C9] was [C1] [V1] [C9]? ; [V1] is a value of the column [C1]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', T1.birth_date) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T1.client_id = T3.client_id INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T3.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T2.account_id = 130

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What's the heading accuracy of Ariel Borysiuk?
orig_masked: What's the [C146] of [V1]? ; [V1] is a value of the column [C126]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t2.heading_accuracy FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many superheroes have a neutral alignment?
orig_masked: How many [T9] have a [V1] [C1]?  ; [V1] is a value of the column [C1]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id WHERE T2.alignment = 'Neutral'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Provide the full name of the superhero named Alien.
orig_masked: Provide the [C20] of the [T9] [C28] [V1]. ; [V1] is a value of the column [C28]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT full_name FROM superhero WHERE superhero_name = 'Alien'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What are the accounts that have gold credit cards?
orig_masked: What are the [C13] that have [V1] [T2]?  ; [V1] is a value of the column [C8]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T2.account_id FROM disp AS T2  INNER JOIN card AS T1 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id  WHERE T1.type = 'gold'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many accounts in Beroun were opened after 1996?
orig_masked: How many [T1] in [V1] were [C2] [C2] [V2]? ; [V1] is a value of the column [C24]; [V2] is a value of the column [C2]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(account_id) FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) > '1996' AND T2.A2 = 'Beroun'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many of the accounts are from Jesenik district?
orig_masked: How many of the [T1] are from [V1] [T5]?  ; [V1] is a value of the column [C24]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.account_id) FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.A2 = 'Jesenik'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: In what country did the Poland Ekstraklasa take place?
orig_masked: In what [T1] did the [V1] [T1]? ; [V1] is a value of the column [C5]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT name FROM Country WHERE id IN ( SELECT country_id FROM League WHERE name = 'Poland Ekstraklasa' )

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Which kind of credit card does client number 9 possess?
orig_masked: Which [C8] of [T2] does [C10] [V1] possess? ; [V1] is a value of the column [C10]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T3.type FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id INNER JOIN card AS T3 ON T2.disp_id = T3.disp_id WHERE T1.client_id = 9
